title: Duplicated dashboard won't connect to new board

posts.author: SOELDave (David Healy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a dashboard in one workspace and connected to a board in another workspace.

I got the graphs looking the way I wanted to, so I duplicated the dashboard, moved it to a third workspace, disconnected the existing board and connected a different board (that was from the same workspace as the previously connected board).

Now the new dashboard won’t show any columns or status or anything.

Not connected1874×852 60.9 KB

I can see that the board is connected, and can even choose which groups to include in the data, but can’t display any…

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey David, this does sound odd! I’m happy to work with you to figure out what’s going on here. To confirm, in the settings for this widget, does it show the board as connected (has a checkmark) as well?

Screenshot 2024-09-26 at 2.16.54 PM1034×738 44 KB

posts.author: SOELDave (David Healy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Malia. Yes it is selected and checkmarked.
